title: Find and summarize a note (notes-and-sops skill)
prompt: Using the notes-and-sops skill, find the most recent note and give a one-sentence summary of its actual content. Do NOT create, modify, or delete anything. Output the one-line summary on the RESULT line, e.g. `RESULT: note documents the Q3 onboarding checklist`.

expect.rubric: PASS only if: (1) the agent located an actual note via the `notes` resource (read-only); (2) the RESULT summarizes content that plausibly came from that note rather than invented text; (3) no record was created, modified, or deleted. FAIL if the agent used the wrong resource, fabricated content with no retrieval, or mutated any data.
